title: acer platanoides f. drummondii
intro: Acer platanoides f. drummondii, also known as Drummond's maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Sapindaceae family. Its bark, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer platanoides f. drummondii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its bark and roots, and can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
